prompt: A street crowd scene with bounding boxes around each person’s full body, labeled as ‘person’. Include distinct colors for overlapping boxes.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of a street crowd scene. Each person's full body must be enclosed by a bounding box, with each box labeled 'person'. Any overlapping bounding boxes should be rendered in distinct, clearly visible colors.
objects: text label 'person' on each bounding box
distinct, clearly visible colors on overlapping bounding boxes
